personal.name: Jangam Sri Charan
personal.title: Aspiring Software Developer & AI Enthusiast
bio: A first-year student with a quiet obsession for writing code that actually does something. From C programs to a live AI chatbot — I build to learn, and I learn to build better.
I don't just study programming — I live inside it. Whether it's debugging a boolean function at midnight or launching a chatbot for the world to try, I'm always chasing that next working build.

I'm building my foundation brick by brick: data structures, object-oriented design, web development — and channeling it all into real projects. The AI chatbot you'll see below? That's not a tutorial. I built it and deployed it myself.
personal.quote: Every expert was once a beginner who simply refused to stop.
personal.currently_building: AI chatbot · Portfolio website · DSA practice
personal.goal: Become a skilled software developer and contribute to real-world products that matter.

projects.name: Sri Charan's AI Chatbot
projects.description: A fully deployed AI-powered chatbot — live on the internet right now. Not a tutorial project. I built it, configured it, and dropped it to a real URL for anyone to try.
highlights: Deployed live on Render — no localhost

projects.name: Portfolio Website

highlights: Fully responsive from mobile to desktop
Smooth scroll with subtle particle effects
